metadata.description: Catalyne's curated public marketplace of Claude Code plugins and skills. Each entry is independently shippable, MIT-licensed, and ready to install.

plugins.name: expert-design-n-brand
plugins.description: Guides teams through structured brand identity discovery, multi-stakeholder synthesis, and design system generation. Produces a complete, tier-classified set of brand artifacts — canonical guidelines, tokens (W3C DTCG with industry-standard vocabulary), Tailwind config, Figma Tokens Studio import, a single consolidated cross-surface design map covering Slides/PowerPoint/Keynote/Canva, an interactive single-file HTML playground for exploring tokens across Marketing/App/Slide/Glossary surfaces with compare mode and live token controls, process record, and LLM-readable brand definition — from conversational elicitation.

plugins.name: catalynes-outbound-sales
plugins.description: Catalyne's end-to-end outbound sales workflow: qualify a CSV of leads against an ICP, enrich the qualified leads with LinkedIn data via Apify, and generate two versions of a personalized LinkedIn DM per lead (75-word in-conversation + ≤300-char connection request).
